abstract.text: The raw document as was parsed from the barcode. The original field key names and field values as they appear in the barcode are left as-is. The mnemonic field keys from the AAMVA specification are not replaced with human-readable names. No field value normalization, like ISO 8601 date reformatting, etc., is done.
Vehicle Safety Inspection Data. File type “VS”.
Registrant And Vehicle Data. File type “IR”.

Brazilian National Identity Card (Registro Geral), back side
European Health Insurance Card (EHIC). Supports formats with both four and five lines of data.
